// Green fixture for spec 120 R6 scan (e) (defense-in-depth): the same
// reverse-derivation shape WITH its idvalidate gate present — must
// NOT be flagged.
package fixture

import (
	"strings"

	"github.com/mrmaxsteel/mindspec/internal/idvalidate"
	"github.com/mrmaxsteel/mindspec/internal/workspace"
)

func gatedReverseDerivation(branch string) (string, bool) {
	beadID := strings.TrimPrefix(branch, workspace.BeadBranchPrefix)
	if idvalidate.BeadID(beadID) != nil {
		return "", false
	}
	return beadID, true
}
